title: pneumatopteris laevis
intro: Pneumatopteris laevis, also known as the smooth tree fern or smooth walking fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Guinea. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, and its extracts have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Pneumatopteris laevis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
